entries.source: Ask for subject, level, time limit, and question types if missing.
entries.value: Iarr ábhar, leibhéal, teorainn ama, agus cineálacha ceisteanna má tá siad ar iarraidh.

entries.source: Ask for subjects, deadlines, resources, and pain points.
entries.value: Iarr ábhair, spriocdhátaí, acmhainní, agus pointí pianmhara.

entries.source: Ask for subjects, time spent, wins, misses, and upcoming deadlines.
entries.value: Iarr ábhair, am caite, buaite, teipeanna, agus spriocdhátaí atá ag teacht.

entries.source: Ask for the data, context, and question being answered.
entries.value: Iarr na sonraí, an comhthéacs, agus an cheist atá á freagairt.

entries.source: Ask for the diagram parts or subject, then generate a label list and practice round.
entries.value: Iarr codanna na léaráide nó an t-ábhar, ansin gin liosta lipéad agus babhta cleachtaidh.

entries.source: Ask for the habit, current obstacle, and easiest starting version.
entries.value: Iarr an nós, an constaic reatha, agus an leagan tosaigh is éasca.

entries.source: Ask for the learning context and behaviors worth rewarding.
entries.value: Iarr an comhthéacs foghlama agus na hiompraíochtaí is fiú a luaíocht.

entries.source: Ask for the note set, subject, and desired organization style.
entries.value: Iarr an tacar nótaí, an t-ábhar, agus an stíl eagrúcháin atá uait.

entries.source: Ask for the one highest-impact revision priority, then rewrite the paragraph yourself.
entries.value: Iarr an tosaíocht athbhreithnithe is mó tionchar, ansin athscríobh an mhír tú féin.

entries.source: Ask for the passage or title and the learner's goal.
entries.value: Iarr an sliocht nó an teideal agus sprioc an fhoghlaimeora.

entries.source: Ask for the prerequisite ideas, a plain-language model, one example, one practice task, and one way to test understanding.
entries.value: Iarr na smaointe réamhriachtanacha, samhail i ngnáthchaint, sampla amháin, tasc cleachtaidh amháin, agus bealach amháin chun tuiscint a thástáil.

entries.source: Ask for the question, learner answer, and expected answer if any part is missing.
entries.value: Iarr an cheist, freagra an fhoghlaimeora, agus an freagra a bhfuiltear ag súil leis má tá cuid ar bith ar iarraidh.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest explanation or next experiment.
entries.value: Iarr an míniú is lú nó an chéad turgnamh eile.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest hint or a check on your attempted step.
entries.value: Iarr an leid is lú nó seiceáil ar an gcéim a rinne tú iarracht.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest useful hint
entries.value: Iarr an leid úsáideach is lú

entries.source: Ask for the source text, claim, author, date, and context if missing.
entries.value: Iarr an téacs foinse, an maíomh, an t-údar, an dáta, agus an comhthéacs má tá siad ar iarraidh.

entries.source: Ask for the study block length and suggest a break rhythm.
entries.value: Iarr fad an bhloc staidéir agus mol rithim sosanna.

entries.source: Ask for the task, target duration, and completion criteria.
entries.value: Iarr an tasc, an fad sprice, agus critéir chríochnaithe.

entries.source: Ask for the text and desired length if missing.
entries.value: Iarr an téacs agus an fad atá uait má tá siad ar iarraidh.

entries.source: Ask for the topic and which side the learner wants; take the opposite side.
entries.value: Iarr an t-ábhar agus cén taobh atá ag teastáil ón bhfoghlaimeoir; tóg an taobh eile.

entries.source: Ask for the topic in plain language, then request one analogy, one example, and one common misconception.
entries.value: Iarr an topaic i ngnáthchaint, ansin iarr analóg amháin, sampla amháin, agus míthuiscint choitianta amháin.

entries.source: Ask for the topic, context, what they tried, and desired help.
entries.value: Iarr an t-ábhar, an comhthéacs, cad a thriail siad, agus an chabhair atá uathu.

entries.source: Ask for the visible text, labels, and the learner's question if the image is not attached.
entries.value: Iarr an téacs infheicthe, lipéid, agus ceist an fhoghlaimeora mura bhfuil an íomhá ceangailte.

entries.source: Ask for topic and purpose, then propose the central node and first branches.
entries.value: Iarr ábhar agus cuspóir, ansin mol an nód lárnach agus na chéad bhrainsí.

entries.source: Ask for topic and scope, then propose a first map structure.
entries.value: Iarr ábhar agus raon, ansin mol chéad struchtúr mapa.

entries.source: Ask for topic, age/level, and tone; then create a short story setup.
entries.value: Iarr ábhar, aois/leibhéal, agus ton; ansin cruthaigh suíomh gearrscéil.

entries.source: Ask for topic, duration, level, and scoring preference.
entries.value: Iarr ábhar, fad, leibhéal, agus rogha scórála.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, and examiner style; then begin with a warm-up question.
entries.value: Iarr ábhar, leibhéal, agus stíl scrúdaitheora; ansin tosaigh le ceist téimh.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, and preferred game vibe; then create the first quest.
entries.value: Iarr ábhar, leibhéal, agus atmaisféar cluiche is fearr; ansin cruthaigh an chéad rompu.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, exam date, and source material if needed.
entries.value: Iarr ábhar, leibhéal, dáta scrúdaithe, agus bunábhar más gá.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, question types, and number of items.
entries.value: Iarr ábhar, leibhéal, cineálacha ceisteanna, agus líon míreanna.

entries.source: Ask group size, topic, time, and desired outcome.
entries.value: Iarr méid grúpa, ábhar, am, agus toradh atá uait.

entries.source: Ask instrument/level if relevant, then teach one small concept.
entries.value: Iarr uirlis/leibhéal más ábhartha, ansin múin coincheap beag amháin.

entries.source: Ask interests, constraints, and curiosity level before recommending paths.
entries.value: Iarr suimeanna, srianta, agus leibhéal fiosrachta sula molann tú conairí.

entries.source: Ask me five Socratic questions about this topic. After each answer, tell me what assumption I used and what to test next.
entries.value: Cuir cúig cheist Shócraiteacha orm faoin topaic seo. Tar éis gach freagra, inis dom cén toimhde a d’úsáid mé agus cad ba chóir a thástáil ina dhiaidh sin.

entries.source: Ask me one check question
entries.value: Cuir ceist seiceála amháin orm

entries.source: Ask me questions about this poem
entries.value: Cuir ceisteanna orm faoin dán seo

entries.source: Ask me thesis defense questions
entries.value: Cuir ceisteanna cosanta tráchtais orm

entries.source: Ask one focused diagnostic question quickly. Convert the learner's target into a mastery target internally, then start with a simple question that reveals their mental model.
entries.value: Cuir ceist dhiagnóiseach dhírithe amháin go tapa. Tiontaigh sprioc an fhoghlaimeora ina sprioc máistreachta go hinmheánach, ansin tosaigh le ceist shimplí a nochtann a shamhail mheabhrach.

entries.source: Ask one sharp goal question, infer sensible defaults, then create a compact learning map with a try-first activity.
entries.value: Cuir ceist ghéar amháin faoin sprioc, toimhdigh réamhshocruithe ciallmhara, ansin cruthaigh mapa foghlama dlúth le gníomhaíocht triail-ar-dtús.

entries.source: Ask predictions, reveal consequences, adjust variables, and summarize principles.
entries.value: Iarr tuartha, nocht iarmhairtí, coigeartaigh athróga, agus achoimrigh prionsabail.

entries.source: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Cuir ceisteanna, tabhair dúshlán do smaointe, agus foghlaim stair trí chomhráite fréamhaithe le pearsana poiblí ón am atá thart.

entries.source: Ask Socratic Instruction to find the weak link.
entries.value: Iarr ar Socratic Instruction an nasc lag a aimsiú.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check that step.
entries.value: Iarr ar an IS an chéim sin a sheiceáil.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Iarr ar an IS do réasúnaíocht a sheiceáil, ní an toradh amháin.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning.
entries.value: Iarr ar an IS do réasúnaíocht a sheiceáil.

entries.source: Ask the AI to label uncertainty.
entries.value: Iarr ar an IS éiginnteacht a lipéadú.

entries.source: Ask the historical mode to label what is documented, inferred, or simulated.
entries.value: Iarr ar an mód stairiúil lipéad a chur ar a bhfuil doiciméadaithe, tátalta, nó insamhlaithe.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain the topic in plain language first.
entries.value: Iarr ar an bhfoghlaimeoir an t-ábhar a mhíniú i ngnáthchaint ar dtús.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain what changed after each hint.
entries.value: Iarr ar an bhfoghlaimeoir a mhíniú cad a d’athraigh tar éis gach leide.

entries.source: Ask the learner to state their current belief, then test it with a small example.
entries.value: Iarr ar an bhfoghlaimeoir a chreideamh reatha a rá, ansin tástáil é le sampla beag.

entries.source: Ask the real question
entries.value: Cuir an fíorcheist

entries.source: Ask what a different side would claim.
entries.value: Fiafraigh cad a mhaífeadh taobh eile.

entries.source: Ask what a different side, class, era, or source might say.
entries.value: Fiafraigh cad a déarfadh taobh, aicme, ré, nó foinse eile.

entries.source: Ask what data or observations they have and what decision they need.
entries.value: Fiafraigh cad iad na sonraí nó breathnuithe atá acu agus cén cinneadh atá de dhíth orthu.

entries.source: Ask what happened, what they felt, and what they want to improve.
entries.value: Fiafraigh cad a tharla, cad a mhothaigh siad, agus cad ba mhaith leo a fheabhsú.

entries.source: Ask what must be remembered and what familiar place the learner wants to use.
entries.value: Fiafraigh cad is gá a mheabhrú agus cén áit eolach ba mhaith leis an bhfoghlaimeoir a úsáid.

entries.source: Ask what the learner wants to be quizzed on if the topic is missing.
entries.value: Fiafraigh cad ba mhaith leis an bhfoghlaimeoir a bheith á cheistiú air má tá an t-ábhar ar iarraidh.

entries.source: Ask what the learner wants to represent, then propose a simple visual layout.
entries.value: Fiafraigh cad ba mhaith leis an bhfoghlaimeoir a léiriú, ansin mol leagan amach amhairc simplí.

entries.source: Ask what the resource is, audience, and what context they need.
entries.value: Fiafraigh cad é an acmhainn, cé hé an lucht féachana, agus cén comhthéacs atá de dhíth orthu.

entries.source: Ask what they are doing and suggest a low-distraction sound preset.
entries.value: Fiafraigh cad atá á dhéanamh acu agus mol réamhshocrú fuaime le seachráin ísle.

entries.source: Ask what they have tried, then give a hint or worked miniature example.
entries.value: Fiafraigh cad a thriail siad, ansin tabhair leid nó mionshampla oibrithe.

entries.source: Ask your first question and move straight into practice.
entries.value: Cuir do chéad cheist agus bog díreach isteach sa chleachtadh.

entries.source: Ask, evaluate, improve with structure, and retry.
entries.value: Fiafraigh, measúnaigh, feabhsaigh le struchtúr, agus bain triail eile as.

entries.source: Assessment
entries.value: Measúnú

entries.source: Assign XP, levels, quests, and reflection checkpoints.
entries.value: Sann XP, leibhéil, rompu, agus pointí seiceála machnaimh.

entries.value: rianaitheoir tascanna

entries.value: Rianaitheoir Tascanna

entries.source: At Inspir, our mission is to democratize learning by making it accessible, engaging, and enjoyable for all. We believe that everyone has the right to quality education, regardless of their background or circumstances. Our platform is designed to provide students with the tools and resources they need to succeed, while also fostering a love of learning. We strive to create a community that is inclusive, supportive, and empowering, where students can connect with each other and with educators from around the world. By making learning fun and accessible, we aim to inspir a generation of lifelong learners who are equipped to tackle the challenges of the future.
entries.value: Ag Inspir, is é ár misean an fhoghlaim a dhaonlathú trí í a dhéanamh inrochtana, tarraingteach, agus taitneamhach do chách. Creidimid go bhfuil ceart ag gach duine ar oideachas ardchaighdeáin, beag beann ar a chúlra nó ar a chúinsí. Tá ár n-ardán deartha chun na huirlisí agus na hacmhainní atá de dhíth ar dhaltaí chun rath a bhaint amach a sholáthar, agus grá don fhoghlaim a chothú freisin. Déanaimid ár ndícheall pobal cuimsitheach, tacúil, agus cumhachtaithe a chruthú, áit ar féidir le daltaí ceangal lena chéile agus le hoideoirí ar fud an domhain. Trí fhoghlaim a dhéanamh spraíúil agus inrochtana, tá sé mar aidhm againn glúin foghlaimeoirí ar feadh an tsaoil a inspir atá ullamh chun dul i ngleic le dúshláin na todhchaí.

entries.source: At the end of a study session, ask yourself three questions:

entries.source: Avoid claiming private beliefs. For living people, imitate public rhetoric broadly without fabricating personal positions.
entries.value: Seachain creidimh phríobháideacha a mhaíomh. I gcás daoine beo, déan aithris leathan ar reitric phoiblí gan seasaimh phearsanta a chumadh.

entries.source: By using our Service, you agree to subscribe to newsletters, marketing or promotional materials and other information we may send. However, you may opt out of receiving any, or all, of these communications from us by following the unsubscribe link or by emailing at support@inspir.app
entries.value: Trí úsáid a bhaint as ár Seirbhís, aontaíonn tú síntiús a ghlacadh le nuachtlitreacha, ábhair mhargaíochta nó chur chun cinn, agus faisnéis eile a d’fhéadfaimis a sheoladh. Mar sin féin, féadfaidh tú rogha a dhéanamh gan aon cheann de na cumarsáidí seo, nó iad uile, a fháil uainn trí nasc díliostála a leanúint nó trí ríomhphost a sheoladh chuig support@inspir.app

entries.source: BY USING SERVICE OR OTHER SERVICES PROVIDED BY US, YOU ACKNOWLEDGE THAT YOU HAVE READ THESE TERMS OF SERVICE AND AGREE TO BE BOUND BY THEM.
entries.value: TRÍ ÚSÁID A BHAINT AS AN tSEIRBHÍS NÓ AS SEIRBHÍSÍ EILE A SHOLÁTHRAÍMID, ADMHAÍONN TÚ GO BHFUIL NA TÉARMAÍ SEIRBHÍSE SEO LÉITE AGAT AGUS GO nAONTAÍONN TÚ A BHEITH FAOI CHEANGAL ACU.

entries.source: CalOPPA is the first state law in the nation to require commercial websites and online services to post a privacy policy. The law’s reach stretches well beyond California to require a person or company in the United States (and conceivable the world) that operates websites collecting personally identifiable information from California consumers to post a conspicuous privacy policy on its website stating exactly the information being collected and those individuals with whom it is being shared, and to comply with this policy.
entries.value: Is é CalOPPA an chéad dlí stáit sa náisiún a éilíonn ar shuíomhanna gréasáin tráchtála agus ar sheirbhísí ar líne polasaí príobháideachais a phostáil. Síneann réim an dlí i bhfad níos faide ná California chun a éileamh ar dhuine nó ar chuideachta sna Stáit Aontaithe (agus, go hinchreidte, ar fud an domhain) a oibríonn suíomhanna gréasáin a bhailíonn faisnéis inaitheanta phearsanta ó thomhaltóirí California polasaí príobháideachais follasach a phostáil ar a suíomh gréasáin, ag rá go díreach cén fhaisnéis atá á bailiú agus cé leis a bhfuil sí á roinnt, agus cloí leis an bpolasaí seo.

entries.source: Career Explorer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore careers through interests, skills, day-in-the-life examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Mód Foghlama IS Career Explorer chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: fiosraigh gairmeacha trí shuimeanna, scileanna, samplaí de lá i saol an phoist, agus na chéad chéimeanna eile.

entries.source: Case Study Simulator AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Enter a realistic case, make decisions, see consequences, and learn the principle behind each choice.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Mód Foghlama IS Case Study Simulator chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: téigh isteach i gcás réalaíoch, déan cinntí, féach iarmhairtí, agus foghlaim an prionsabal taobh thiar de gach rogha.
